main.description: Ask the authenticated user for permission for a sender DID to notify them. User-authenticated (via the authSender permission set); the sender DID and display metadata are supplied in the body.

senderDid.description: The DID that will send notifications. This is what the user approves and what `send` calls authenticate as.

title.description: Short display name shown to the user during approval (e.g. "Bookhive").

description.description: Optional one-line context shown during approval.

iconUrl.description: Optional HTTPS URL to a small square icon shown during approval.
